title: Diffeq minor version fixed previous test failure

body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `RootSolvers` package to `0.3`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for RootSolvers at version 0.3, (keep existing compat)
